creator: dijke@xs4all.nl
text:
My 6.1 and 7.0 ISOs do not succ. boot due to USB keyboard problem.

System is Dell Dimension 3100. keyboard is compatible with Debian and Windows.

All versions of FreeBSD have problems including 4.6/6.0/6.1 and 7.0

System gives the following message during boot:

========================
usb 0: host controller halted
panic: usb_insert_transfer
cpuid = 0
KDB: enter panic
[thread] pid 0 tid 0]
Stopped at kdb_enter+0x2b: nop
db>
==========================

The keyboard is frozen after this.

Fix: 

unknown
How-To-Repeat: Boot FreeBSD with Dell 3100
